name: Mine
description: OpenClaw-first mine plugin that drives the social-data-crawler runtime and reports mining task results.

crawlerRoot.description: Absolute path to the social-data-crawler project root.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run the plugin helper scripts.

platformToken.description: Optional bearer token for Platform Service. Leave empty for auth-disabled deployments.

minerId.description: Miner identifier used for claim and heartbeat calls.

outputRoot.description: Directory where plugin-triggered crawler runs are stored.

defaultBackend.description: Optional backend override passed to social-data-crawler.

awpWalletBin.description: Path or command name for awp-wallet CLI. Production deployments should normally leave this as 'awp-wallet' and install the CLI on PATH.

awpWalletToken.description: awp-wallet session token (from 'awp-wallet unlock --duration 3600'). Required for EIP-712 signed requests.

awpWalletTokenRef.description: Optional OpenClaw SecretRef for resolving the awp-wallet session token from env/file/exec providers at runtime.

workerStateRoot.description: Directory for autonomous worker state such as backlog, auth pending, and submit pending.

workerMaxParallel.description: Maximum concurrent crawler work items handled by the autonomous worker.

datasetRefreshSeconds.description: Minimum seconds between autonomous dataset discovery scheduling.

discoveryMaxPages.description: Maximum pages per autonomous discover-crawl seed.

discoveryMaxDepth.description: Maximum depth per autonomous discover-crawl seed.

authRetryIntervalSeconds.description: Retry interval for auth-pending items after PUBLIC_URL/VNC login is required.
